trials.title: Discontinuation of CDK4/6 Inhibitors in Patients With Metastatic HR Positive, HER2 Negative Breast Cancer
trials.explanation: Patient does not meet the trial requirements due to HER2 status and lack of CDK4/6 inhibitor treatment.

criteria.rationale: Patient's hormone receptor status (positive) matches the trial's requirement for hormone-receptor positive disease.
Patient's HER2 status (positive) does not match the trial's requirement for HER2 negative disease.

criteria.text: On a CDK4/6 inhibitor (with endocrine therapy)
criteria.rationale: Patient is not on a CDK4/6 inhibitor, which is required by the trial.

criteria.text: Durable disease control on CDK4/6i for >=12 months
criteria.rationale: Patient does not have documented durable disease control on a CDK4/6 inhibitor for the required duration.
Patient's ECOG status (1) matches the trial's requirement for ECOG performance status 0 or 1.

locations.facility: MVZ für Hämatologie und Onkologie der MVZ Mülheim GmbH

trials.title: PAveMenT: Palbociclib and Avelumab in Metastatic AR+ Triple Negative Breast Cancer
trials.explanation: Patient does not meet the trial requirements due to ER and HER2 status.

criteria.rationale: Patient's estrogen receptor status (positive) does not match the trial's requirement for ER negative status.
Patient's progesterone receptor status (negative) matches the trial's requirement for PR negative status.
Patient's HER2 status (positive) does not match the trial's requirement for HER2 negative status.
Patient's androgen receptor status (positive) matches the trial's requirement for AR positive status.
Patient has measurable metastatic disease, which meets the trial's requirement.

locations.facility: Addenbrooke's Hospital Cambridge University Hospitals NHS Foundation Trust
Beatson West of Scotland Cancer Centre

trials.title: A Study of Disitamab Vedotin With Other Anticancer Drugs in Solid Tumors
trials.explanation: Patient meets all trial requirements for HER2-expressing metastatic breast cancer.

criteria.rationale: Patient's HER2 status (positive) matches the trial's requirement for HER2-expressing disease.
Patient has metastatic disease, which meets the trial's requirement for metastatic breast cancer.
Patient's ECOG status (1) matches the trial's requirement for ECOG performance status 0 or 1.

locations.facility: UC Irvine Health - Chao Family Comprehensive Cancer Center
University of California, San Francisco | HDFCCC - Hematopoietic Malignancies
UCLA Department of Medicine - Hematology & Oncology

locations.display: Washington D.C., District of Columbia, United States

locations.facility: Moffitt Cancer Center at Wesley Chapel

transcript.text: @srijanmeh8/trialsync-intake New TrialSync matching task. Match patient P003 against all curated trials. Summarize the patient, then hand off down the pipeline; the analyzer posts and publishes the final result.

HR/ER/PR: ER+, PR-
HER2: Positive
AR: Positive
ECOG: 1
Labs: ANC 2.8, HGB 11.9, Platelets 180.0
Prior Therapies: Fulvestrant (Line 1)
CDK4/6 Status: Not on inhibitor
Brain Mets: No

NCT06207734: Discontinuation of CDK4/6 Inhibitors in Patients With Metastatic HR Positive, HER2 Negative Breast Cancer

NCT06157892: A Study of Disitamab Vedotin With Other Anticancer Drugs in Solid Tumors
@srijanmeh8/trialsync-parser please restate the eligibility constraints.

Patient P003 eligibility constraints:

- NCT06207734: HER2 must be negative, ECOG 0-1, on a CDK4/6 inhibitor with endocrine therapy for at least 12 months with disease control.
- NCT04360941: ER, PR, and HER2 must be negative, AR must be positive, measurable disease (RECIST 1.1).
- NCT06157892: HER2 must be positive or low, ECOG 0-1, metastatic or locally-advanced breast cancer.
